news.title:
VA Tech Wabag forms JV, Ghaziabad Bioenergy, with PEAK Sustainability Ventures.
Both partners hold nearly 50% equity; three-year lock-in under shareholder agreement.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag forms JV, Ghaziabad Bioenergy, with PEAK Sustainability Ventures.
Both partners hold nearly 50% equity; three-year lock-in under shareholder agreement.

news.title:
VA Tech WABAG's shares rose 2.7% to Rs 1,235.95 after securing a Rs 250-600 crore wastewater project in Georgia.
The project, funded by the European Investment Bank, highlights WABAG's global expansion and expertise in sustainable water management.
news.summary:
VA Tech WABAG's shares rose 2.7% to Rs 1,235.95 after securing a Rs 250-600 crore wastewater project in Georgia.
The project, funded by the European Investment Bank, highlights WABAG's global expansion and expertise in sustainable water management.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag secures a large consortium order for a 19 MLD WWTP project in Kutaisi, Georgia, funded by EIB.
The project includes demolition, construction, and commissioning, with 12 months of O&M, marking Wabag's entry into CIS and Georgian markets.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag secures a large consortium order for a 19 MLD WWTP project in Kutaisi, Georgia, funded by EIB.
The project includes demolition, construction, and commissioning, with 12 months of O&M, marking Wabag's entry into CIS and Georgian markets.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag's $400M West Asia portfolio remains unaffected by conflict.
The crisis may create opportunities in post-war reconstruction and infra spending.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag's $400M West Asia portfolio remains unaffected by conflict.
The crisis may create opportunities in post-war reconstruction and infra spending.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag shares jumped 5% to ₹1,290 after securing a ₹1,000 crore contract from CMWSSB.
Rekha Jhunjhunwala holds 8.03% stake; stock delivered 5.29% weekly but is down YTD by 5.6%.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag shares jumped 5% to ₹1,290 after securing a ₹1,000 crore contract from CMWSSB.
Rekha Jhunjhunwala holds 8.03% stake; stock delivered 5.29% weekly but is down YTD by 5.6%.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag wins mega order worth ₹1000cr for Chennai water grid project, boosting order book to ₹16,300cr.
Bajel Projects secures ₹700cr EPC contract from MSETCL; Data Patterns bags ₹288cr IMD radar supply order.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag wins mega order worth ₹1000cr for Chennai water grid project, boosting order book to ₹16,300cr.
Bajel Projects secures ₹700cr EPC contract from MSETCL; Data Patterns bags ₹288cr IMD radar supply order.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag JV got a mega Chennai water project funded by ADB.
The 54-month project includes pipelines, SCADA, and 10 years O&M.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag JV got a mega Chennai water project funded by ADB.
The 54-month project includes pipelines, SCADA, and 10 years O&M.

news.title:
Motilal Oswal maintains Buy on VA Tech Wabag with ₹1,900 TP, citing robust ₹163bn order book (~5x FY25 revenue).
Key drivers include ₹10bn Chennai TTRO contract, 15–20% revenue growth, FY25–28 CAGR of 17%/22%/23%, and ₹8.9bn net cash.
news.summary:
Motilal Oswal maintains Buy on VA Tech Wabag with ₹1,900 TP, citing robust ₹163bn order book (~5x FY25 revenue).
Key drivers include ₹10bn Chennai TTRO contract, 15–20% revenue growth, FY25–28 CAGR of 17%/22%/23%, and ₹8.9bn net cash.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag secures a mega PPP order from CMWSSB for a 45 MLD TTRO plant in Chennai.
The project involves refurbishment, operation, and maintenance over 18 months and 18.5 years respectively.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag secures a mega PPP order from CMWSSB for a 45 MLD TTRO plant in Chennai.
The project involves refurbishment, operation, and maintenance over 18 months and 18.5 years respectively.

news.title:
Water and pump stocks surge up to 20% after Jal Jeevan Mission extension, with a total outlay of ₹8.69 lakh crore approved.
Top gainers include Denta Water, Shakti Pumps, Indian Hume Pipe, Vishnu Prakash R Punglia; KEC International and VA Tech Wabag also rise.
news.summary:
Water and pump stocks surge up to 20% after Jal Jeevan Mission extension, with a total outlay of ₹8.69 lakh crore approved.
Top gainers include Denta Water, Shakti Pumps, Indian Hume Pipe, Vishnu Prakash R Punglia; KEC International and VA Tech Wabag also rise.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag's West Asia operations remain stable, contributing 25% to its order book despite tensions.
Order backlog stands at Rs 16,300 cr; management expects Rs 3,000 cr orders to convert soon.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag's West Asia operations remain stable, contributing 25% to its order book despite tensions.
Order backlog stands at Rs 16,300 cr; management expects Rs 3,000 cr orders to convert soon.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag faces GST demand of ₹43.74L for FY19-20 over excess ITC claims.
Issued by GST Commissionerate, UP; company plans to legally appeal the order.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag faces GST demand of ₹43.74L for FY19-20 over excess ITC claims.
Issued by GST Commissionerate, UP; company plans to legally appeal the order.

news.title: Va Tech Wabag asserts its operations in West Asia remain confined to small sites away from war zones.
news.summary: Va Tech Wabag asserts its operations in West Asia remain confined to small sites away from war zones.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag sees no immediate impact from US-Israel-Iran war on West Asia operations.
Projects in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Gulf regions are away from sensitive zones like US bases.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag sees no immediate impact from US-Israel-Iran war on West Asia operations.
Projects in UAE, Saudi Arabia, Gulf regions are away from sensitive zones like US bases.

news.title:
US-Iran conflict impacts Indian equities; Sensex drops 2,700 pts, later recovers partially, Nifty hovers at 24,850 amid crude price concerns.
Stocks like L&T (-7.5%), TCS (-3%), KEC (-12%), VA Tech (-12%), Kalyan Jewellers (-4%) face declines due to Middle East exposure.
news.summary:
US-Iran conflict impacts Indian equities; Sensex drops 2,700 pts, later recovers partially, Nifty hovers at 24,850 amid crude price concerns.
Stocks like L&T (-7.5%), TCS (-3%), KEC (-12%), VA Tech (-12%), Kalyan Jewellers (-4%) face declines due to Middle East exposure.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag targets 15-20% revenue CAGR, supported by a strong order book, rising international presence, and stable margins.
The company's Q3FY26 profit rose 24%, with EBITDA up 20% and margins at 13.7%; net cash exceeded Rs. 1,000 crore.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag targets 15-20% revenue CAGR, supported by a strong order book, rising international presence, and stable margins.
The company's Q3FY26 profit rose 24%, with EBITDA up 20% and margins at 13.7%; net cash exceeded Rs. 1,000 crore.

news.title:
NBCC, NCC, G R Infraprojects, and Va Tech Wabag feature order books surpassing market caps, signaling strong demand.
Key metrics: RoE >12%, RoCE >12%, low debt-to-equity ratios; focus on operational efficiency and sector expansion.
news.summary:
NBCC, NCC, G R Infraprojects, and Va Tech Wabag feature order books surpassing market caps, signaling strong demand.
Key metrics: RoE >12%, RoCE >12%, low debt-to-equity ratios; focus on operational efficiency and sector expansion.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag forms Ghaziabad Bioenergy Pvt Ltd, a JV for a Compressed Bio Gas project.
VA Tech Wabag holds a 51% stake in the newly incorporated subsidiary.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag forms Ghaziabad Bioenergy Pvt Ltd, a JV for a Compressed Bio Gas project.
VA Tech Wabag holds a 51% stake in the newly incorporated subsidiary.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag reports 18% YoY revenue growth to Rs. 2530 cr, EBITDA margin steady at 13.7%.
PAT rose 24% YoY to Rs. 242 cr, strong order book at Rs. 163 bn, and Rs. 1080 cr cash balance.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag reports 18% YoY revenue growth to Rs. 2530 cr, EBITDA margin steady at 13.7%.
PAT rose 24% YoY to Rs. 242 cr, strong order book at Rs. 163 bn, and Rs. 1080 cr cash balance.

news.title:
VA Tech Wabag received interim stay from Karnataka HC on GST orders.
Orders involved alleged GST misclassification with dues of INR 1.2 Cr and INR 23.2 L.
news.summary:
VA Tech Wabag received interim stay from Karnataka HC on GST orders.
Orders involved alleged GST misclassification with dues of INR 1.2 Cr and INR 23.2 L.
